title: ACES Scenario Pack — Lifecycle (v0)
description: The maturity and publication state of a pack as an authored artifact. States describe the pack only and deliberately do not reuse downstream catalog or challenge-platform workflow statuses.

packId.description: Pack this lifecycle record applies to.

state.description: Current lifecycle state from the contract's ACES-native set.

history.description: Optional record of prior lifecycle transitions.

state.description: Lifecycle state at this point in the pack's history.
